LanguageData.RPR_RegimeHarshThought.stages.0.label: Harshly oppressed
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeHarshThought.stages.0.descript: My god! Those colonists are oppressing us...
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeDeterrenceThought.stages.0.des: Oh! Those wardens are terrifying... I dare not take any action...
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeEqualityThought.stages.0.label: Treated equally
LanguageData.RPR_RegimeEqualityThought.stages.0.descr: My god, as a prisoner I am actually treated equally!
